Dept. 33 A little something extra.
Sign in with mod.io
You need a mod.io account to subscribe to and install mods. Don't have one? Create a free account — then come back here and enter your email below.
  1. Enter the email linked to your mod.io account above
  2. Check your inbox for a 5-character code from mod.io
  3. Enter the code here to sign in
Enter your code
A 5-character code was sent to your email. Check your inbox (and spam folder) and enter it below.
